{{Expand}}

{{Infobox group
| name = High Council (The Last Horizon)
| introduced = The Engineer
}}

== The Engineer ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Starhammer]] does not want anyone outside the High [[Council]] to know he visited [[Doctor Nova]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c8">''The Engineer'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The High [[Council]] is a governing body that [[Starhammer]] may influence by removing those who oppose him.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c41">''The Engineer'', chapter 41</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon groups]]
